Item Type
Determines what param is referenced when this item is used

There are effects whose parameters change depending on skills, magic, items, etc. (enchantment weapons, etc.), so the fixed effect should be set for each action so that it can correspond to an effect such as 'powering up only weapon attacks'. Set 'None' for items that do not require settings, such as baristas.
